dna.dialects.entity.title: Database Dialect Source
dna.dialects.entity.description: Manages database dialect sources provided by the classpath, remote URLs, and uploaded jars.
dna.dialects.title.name: Source Name
dna.dialects.description.name: Name used to display and identify the dialect source
dna.dialects.description.sourceType: Dialect source type, such as CLASSPATH, URL, or UPLOAD
dna.dialects.description.sourceUrl: Download URL used when the dialect source comes from a remote location
dna.dialects.description.localJarPath: Local jar path of the most recently loaded dialect source
dna.dialects.description.enabled: Whether the dialect source can participate in dialect discovery and binding
dna.dialects.description.loadedAt: Time when the dialect source was loaded most recently
dna.dialects.description.lastLoadMessage: Result message of the latest dialect-source load
dna.dialects.page.error.createUrl: Failed to create URL dialect source.
dna.dialects.page.table.dialects.name: Dialect
dna.dialects.page.table.sources.name: Dialect Source
dna.dialects.page.alert.loaded.title: Unified dialect source view
dna.dialects.page.alert.loaded.descripti: This view shows classpath dialects from project dependencies, dialects loaded from remote URLs, and dialects loaded from uploaded jars, together with their automatically bound drivers.
dna.dialects.page.modal.url.title: Create URL Dialect Source
dna.dialects.page.modal.upload.title: Upload Dialect Jar
dna.dialects.page.form.name.label: Source Name
dna.dialects.page.form.sourceUrl.label: Remote URL
dna.dialects.page.form.description.label: Description
dna.dialects.page.form.enabled.label: Enabled
dna.dialects.page.description.uploadIntr: After upload, the database dialect implementations inside the jar are discovered automatically through SPI / ServiceLoader.
dna.dialects.page.form.jar.label: Dialect Jar
dna.dialects.page.form.jar.dragText: Click or drag a dialect jar here to upload
dna.dialects.page.form.jar.hint: Only one jar file is supported
